rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE KATALIN SZANTO'S REVOCABLE TRUST DTD 3/3/08 TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative For Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: Respondent Agnes Szanto's Motion for Summary Judgment or in the Alternative for Summary Adjudication is denied. Respondent has not met her burden of proving the laches defense. Triable issues of material fact exist regarding whether Anna's delay in filing her Petition was unreasonable and whether that delay resulted in undue prejudice to Agnes. The prevailing party shall prepare the proposed order. Any one choosing to contest must notify the Court and opposing counsel no later than 1/27/2016, at 4:00 p.m.
